overall.description: A first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, traveling via an elevated cable car system through Night City. The scene features heavy neon lighting, holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and consistent heavy rainfall characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit station platform with vending machines

agents.ego_description: traveling forward through the station platform in a cable car, observing vending machines and potted trees on the right

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with various products visible through glass fronts
large planters containing trees and greenery lining the platform walkway
concrete walkway with yellow safety markings and scattered debris
overhead metal and concrete roof structure providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: The cable car moves through a covered station platform, passing rows of illuminated vending machines and potted trees. The platform is empty of pedestrians, with artificial lighting casting a yellow-green glow on the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cable car track with panoramic city views

events.description: exits covered station platform onto open elevated track with cityscape view
heavy rain becomes clearly visible against the backdrop of city lights

agents.ego_description: traveling along elevated track, turning right while observing the sprawling cityscape and large digital billboards

entered.detail: large holographic billboard displaying '09' and 'CC 2074' in bright white neon
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows rising into the rainy night sky
metal safety railing along the edge of the cable car track

segments.scene_description: The cable car exits the station onto an open elevated track, revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. A massive digital billboard displaying '09' dominates the view as heavy rain falls against the backdrop of illuminated skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor transit corridor with holographic advertising displays

events.description: enters enclosed corridor with bright holographic advertising displays on the walls

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow corridor lined with large holographic advertisements on the left wall

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement for 'sandblast' thermal paste applicator showing a woman applying makeup
holographic travel advertisement showing a beach scene with 'sunny somalia' text
smooth dark wall surface of the enclosed transit corridor

segments.scene_description: The cable car enters an enclosed corridor where the left wall features large holographic advertisements for various products including a thermal paste applicator and vacation destinations. The environment is artificially lit and completely sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between high-rise building facades

events.description: exits advertisement corridor into narrow passage between building facades
passes close to building facade temporarily blocking the view of the city

agents.ego_description: traveling through a narrow gap between buildings, passing illuminated windows and concrete structural elements

entered.detail: rows of illuminated windows on the adjacent high-rise building facade
raw concrete building surface with structural elements and support beams

segments.scene_description: The cable car moves through a narrow passage between towering buildings, with illuminated office windows visible on the left and raw concrete structural elements on the right. Rain continues to fall in the narrow gap between the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street level with water reflections

events.description: exits narrow passage into open area at street level with flooded roadway
vehicle descends toward the water level while approaching destination

agents.ego_description: descending toward street level, approaching a flooded urban area with neon reflections on the water surface

entered.detail: flooded street with rain creating ripples on the dark water surface
lower floors of buildings at street level with illuminated entrances and signage
colorful neon signs and advertisements visible in the distance across the flooded area

segments.scene_description: The cable car emerges from the narrow passage into a wide-open area at street level, revealing a flooded roadway with rain creating ripples on the water surface. Distant neon signs reflect off the water as the vehicle descends toward its final destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile transit station through a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, ending in a flooded urban basin. It begins gliding through a covered platform past illuminated vending machines and potted trees under a yellow-green artificial glow. As the cable car exits the station, the scene opens into a sprawling cityscape dominated by a massive digital billboard and heavy rainfall against a backdrop of skyscrapers. The view then shifts into a sheltered corridor lined with holographic advertisements for thermal paste and vacations before passing through a narrow gap between towering office buildings and raw concrete structures. Finally, the camera emerges from the tight passage into a wide-open area, descending toward a flooded roadway where neon signs reflect off the rippling water surface.
